author: doll-agent
content: Verified harden_mask/soften_mask already exist as inherent methods on MaskedArray (mask_ops.rs) — exposed at crate root for parity. Added mask_or(m1, m2), make_mask(values, shape), and make_mask_none(shape) as free functions in ferray-ma::extras. clump_masked, clump_unmasked, *notmasked_contiguous, *notmasked_edges, mask_rows/cols/rowcols, compress_rows/cols/rowcols/nd, flatten_mask, flatten_structured_array, make_mask_descr are deferred (rare-use or structured-record-dtype-dependent) — issue stays open per project policy on deferred items.
